name: Context7
description: Fetch up-to-date library documentation and code examples for any framework
description_zh: 获取任意框架的最新库文档和代码示例

mcp_config.name: context7
mcp_config.description: Context7 - up-to-date library docs and code examples

auth.help_text: Works without an API key for public docs; add a key for higher limits
auth.help_text_zh: 无需 API Key 即可访问公共文档；添加 Key 可提高限额

name: Microsoft Learn
description: Search and fetch Microsoft Learn documentation through Microsoft's hosted MCP server
description_zh: 通过微软托管的 MCP 服务器搜索和获取 Microsoft Learn 文档

mcp_config.name: microsoft-learn
mcp_config.description: Microsoft Learn - Azure, .NET, Windows, Office documentation

name: AWS Documentation
description: Search AWS documentation and service guidance through AWS Labs' MCP server
description_zh: 通过 AWS Labs MCP 服务器搜索 AWS 文档和服务指南

mcp_config.name: aws-docs
mcp_config.description: AWS Documentation - services, APIs, best practices

auth.help_text: Requires uvx (Python package runner) installed locally
auth.help_text_zh: 需要本地安装 uvx（Python 包运行器）
